variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 754 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 754 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 754 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 60 345 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 754
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P783198 Air Filter, Panel Engine | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 754
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P783198 Air Filter, Panel Engine is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, panel engine applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4916 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 754
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4916 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
